ogTitle: Alexandra Hills vs Alice Creek: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Alexandra Hills and Alice Creek.
heading: Alexandra Hills vs Alice Creek — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Alexandra Hills, Queensland and Alice Creek, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Alexandra Hills has a lower overall climate risk score (32/100) compared to Alice Creek (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Alexandra Hills or Alice Creek safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Alexandra Hills has a flood risk score of 33/100, while Alice Creek scores 38/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Alexandra Hills scores 31/100 for bushfire risk. Alice Creek scores 48/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Alexandra Hills or Alice Creek?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Alexandra Hills has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.63% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
